task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite. The library currently has 4 active items in 'My Library' plus one item titled 'Generative Adversarial Networks' in the Trash.

Restore the 'Generative Adversarial Networks' item from the Trash back into the regular library. After the restore, the GAN item must not be in the Trash, must exist among regular items, and the regular (non-trashed) item count must equal 5. Leave Zotero running.

verification.description: GAN item no longer in trash
GAN item exists in regular library
